title: Epipactis melinostele
taxonomy: Epipactis melinostele is a species of orchid in the subfamily Epidendroideae, within the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Epipactis, which is characterized by its unique, terrestrial or lithophytic habit. The genus Epipactis is part of the tribe Neotiae, which is a group of orchids found primarily in Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The species E. melinostele is native to China and is considered to be a rare and endangered species. It is often found growing in humid, shaded areas with rich soil.

This plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as arthritis and oxidative stress.
